prompt: Ultra high quality professional monogram logo. Two oversized bold capital letters A and M overlapping prominently, filling most of the frame. The AM letters are deep olive green (#3D5A1E) with very thick heavy weight, dominating the composition. Behind them, a thin delicate rotated square diamond frame in rich true gold (#B8860B). The diamond frame is much thinner than the letters, acting as a subtle accent, not competing for attention. The AM is the hero, the diamond is the supporting frame. Clean white (#FAFAF8) background. Extremely precise geometry, razor sharp edges, perfect symmetry. Premium personal brand quality. Studio-grade graphic design execution. Completely flat design, zero gradients, zero shadows, zero 3D effects. Do not add any text, taglines, or decorative elements outside the logo.
negative_prompt: yellow, bright yellow, lemon, shadows, 3D, gradients, reflections, glow, blur, low quality, amateur, hand-drawn, sketch, watercolor, painted, cartoon, photorealistic, noisy, grainy, text, tagline, extra decorations, floral, organic, thin letters, small letters, busy design

settings.style: premium logo, ultra bold monogram, thin diamond frame
